use_cases: Site-wide navigation header with collapsible menu sections
Mobile-responsive navigation with accordion dropdown menus
Navigation bar for SaaS or product landing pages
Expandable menu items in header navigation
Organized content disclosure in navigation headers
ai_summary: A header navigation component featuring an accordion-based collapsible menu system built with Radix UI primitives. Designed for site-wide navigation with smooth expand/collapse animations and hover states. Suitable for SaaS products, e-commerce sites, and various web applications requiring organized navigation menus with dropdown sections.
